title: Schrödinger's Stolen NFT
relevance_summary: NFT game with hidden Bitcoin where revealing the state of an NFT causes a price crash or spike

prevention.rule: Block any tx that reveals the state of an NFT after a period of holding

red_flags: Price manipulation through revealing the state of an NFT
monitoring_rules: Monitor for transactions that reveal the state of an NFT after a holding period
summary: A game involving NFTs with hidden Bitcoin, where revealing the state of an NFT causes a price crash or spike. A guard could have blocked transactions that revealed the state of an NFT after a holding period.
